content.en:
"It's such a rebellious burning fire forging soul trick, it can actually make the soul transform again and again, which is equivalent to changing a person's qualifications against the sky!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

It is conceivable that once he cultivates the Burning Fire Soul Forging Technique and has a small achievement, his comprehension will improve a lot, and it will be permanently improved, and if it is combined with the comprehension talent, the comprehension amplification effect is too rebellious.

"Enlightenment!"

Ye Tian immediately began to comprehend and cultivate the Burning Fire Soul Forging Technique, but soon he frowned.

Because cultivating the Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique was too painful, it was a pain that penetrated deep into the soul, if it weren't for the fact that he copied and fused countless talents, and had unimaginable immunity to soul pain, otherwise he wouldn't be able to bear this pain.

"If someone else comes to cultivate, I'm afraid they won't even be able to bear the pain, let alone concentrate on cultivating the Burning Fire Soul Forging Technique. However, for me, the Burning Fire Soul Forging Technique is the most suitable soul training technique!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, he went all out to cultivate the Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique.

Sea of Souls.

At this moment, it has turned into a sea of fire, Ye Tian's soul is constantly burning, the impurities in the soul are burned out, and the soul power is also constantly burning and gradually recovering, like a hundred refined steel.

Time passed slowly.

Cultivating the Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique, there is no need to comprehend any laws, even if it is in a time acceleration environment, it will not affect cultivation, so Ye Tian maintains 2,000 times the time acceleration, and the energy consumption required for time acceleration, Ye Tian does not care.

Anyway, resources are used to consume, if you can quickly improve your strength, it will naturally be worth it!

In a flash, 10,000 years have passed, and if you calculate it in an environment where time is accelerating, it is equivalent to saying that Ye Tian has cultivated for 20 million years.

And sustaining such a long time to accelerate cost Ye Tian a lot of resources.

In the past, Ye Tian only occasionally used time to accelerate his cultivation, or did not turn on 2,000 times the time acceleration, this time was undoubtedly the longest time to open the time acceleration, but the harvest was great.

"The second layer of the Burning Fire Forging Soul Technique!"

Ye Tian had already completed two soul transformations, and both the quality and total amount of his soul far exceeded before.

If it was a soul competition, his soul could even easily crush the souls of the Lord of the Yuan Gu and others.

In terms of comprehension, Ye Tian's comprehension is enough to increase six or seven times, and this is only two transformations, if it reaches more than six or seven transformations, then the comprehension improvement effect will be even more rebellious.

"It's a pity that the Burning Fire Soul Forging Technique can't be taught to others, otherwise I will teach it to Yue'er and my sister, then I can turn their talents into real soul geniuses, and their understanding will be greatly increased, and the hope of transcendence in the future will be greatly increased!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But if you think about it carefully, your wife and sister may not be able to practice the Burning Fire Soul Forging Technique, and even if they can practice it, it will take a long time, and now that the two universes are about to merge, there is not so much time left for them.

After cultivating the Burning Flame Soul Forging Technique to the second level, and ushering in two soul transformations, Ye Tian suspended his cultivation to at least stabilize his soul.

In the following days, he began to comprehend supernatural powers, create the secret techniques of the Hunyuan system and the Heavenly Sword system, and comprehend the Great Dao and so on.

Time is never enough for Ye Tian, he must grasp every minute and every second of time and do his best to improve his strength.

After 2000, Ye Tian successfully created the fifth form of the Hunyuan system - Hunyuan Golden Body, which was an enhanced version created on the basis of Hunyuan's true body, but the power was seriously consumed, and even with Ye Tian's strength, it couldn't last long.

6,000 years later, Ye Tian successfully created the fifth type of the Heavenly Sword System, the Heavenly Providence Knife, which can fuse the power of the soul and the power of the Great Dao into one, releasing a move that can annihilate the body and soul, and the power is very terrifying. But due to the need to consume soul energy, Ye Tian could only perform a few dozen moves at most, and he could no longer use them.

After the creation of the fifth form of the Hunyuan system and the fifth form of the Heavenly Sword system, Ye Tian's strength increased a lot again, and now he can be regarded as the strength of a mid-stage three-star god general.

In addition, Ye Tian also spent a lot of time to comprehend the Void Heaven Diagram, the Void Heaven Diagram was the only way for him to become a personal disciple, and only by comprehending that Void Heaven Diagram was 100% clear, he could become the personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

It's a pity that although he has made progress now, he still stops at 15% of the progress and has fallen into a bottleneck again.

The Void Heaven Diagram comprehended the back, it became more and more difficult, and the time it took was also increasing, even if Ye Tian's soul was transformed twice, he still felt infinite difficulty, and he couldn't even see the slightest hope.

And the cultivation of the Xuanxuan Jue is also very difficult, and it requires a lot of resources, and it must be the highest level of resources, and it is difficult for Ye Tian to find so many resources.

Last time, he was able to obtain the Ancient Demon Essence Yuan in the Ancient Demon Tower, and let the Xuan Xuan Jue impact to the third layer of the Perfection Realm, it was a big opportunity, but such an opportunity was very difficult to encounter again.

Therefore, his current Xuan Xuan Jue is still in the third level of perfection.

"If I can cultivate the Xuanxuan Technique to the fourth layer realm, my physical body will transform again, and my strength will definitely increase!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating, and suddenly there was a feeling of palpitations, although it was very subtle, but it caught Ye Tian's attention.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared above the Terran starry sky, his divine sense covering all around, and he sensed it carefully.

"The universe is shaking, this is another layer of dimensional world shattering!"

Ye Tian naturally didn't feel strange about the collapse of the dimensional world, after all, a dimensional world would collapse every few days, but this time it felt different, proving that this shattered dimensional world was very special, and it might cause great danger.

Bang!!!!

The void shattered, and pieces of continental fragments fell from the void and smashed into the universe.

These continental fragments are huge, some of them are as large as a galaxy, so you can imagine how huge the fragments are.

For a time, many stars in the universe were directly smashed into pieces by the continental fragments, and countless creatures fell.

Over the Terrans.

One by one, the Earth Venerable turned into a monstrous giant, exerting the power of the vast sea to stop these continent fragments, and Ye Tian also took action, moving the continent fragments away one by one to prevent them from crashing into the Starry Sky Continent of the Terrans.

In short, as long as they don't hit the continental fragments of the Terran Starry Sky Continent, the Terran Earth Venerables will not care, after all, these continental fragments are also chances, and they can also be integrated into the Terran Starry Sky Continent in the future.

But soon, countless source beasts rushed out from the fragments of the continent, and many of them were comparable to the source beasts of the Earth Venerable.

"This is the continental fragment of the Origin Realm!"

Ye Tian's expression changed.

The strength of the origin beasts in the origin realm, he is very clear, there are a large number of earth-honor-level source beasts there!

Moreover, the source beasts that are comparable to the cosmic gods and above, but the origin is far beyond the main world, after all, it is under the key care of the cosmic origin, even if those source beasts cannot be transcended, but the current combat power is more than the main world.

"It's troublesome, now, the cosmic forces are estimated to be reshuffled!"

Ye Tian sighed.

However, with him, even if the human race has losses, there will be no danger of extinction, but other forces and races are not necessarily.

Ye Tian can't control other forces, he can only protect the human race.
